title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners:
ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners!
